關於<Color=red>傳說中的調味料<Color=white>的事嗎？

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Oh, hello. You're a traveler, aren't you?
But I guess we're all travelers, aren't we,
in one way or another! Haha!
You haven't by chance heard about a
<Color=red>legendary pumpkin<Color=white>, have you?

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>我本以为来到信息汇集的驿站，

so I thought I'd hear about the <Color=red>legendary
pumpkin <Color=white>here, but so far, no such luck.

rows.CNzh: 传说中的调味料？
rows.TWzh: 傳說中的調味料？

应该不知道的吧……

传说中的大师之盐<Color=white>，
只要轻轻一挥，
就能击退怪物什么的……
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>我问来问去都没人知道……<unk[5:0]>
说不定是假消息吧……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>也是啊……<unk[5:0]>
你也不知道呢……
<unk[3:0:263]>聽說在某座森林裡
有著<Color=red>傳說中的大師之鹽<Color=white>，
只要輕輕一揮手，
好像就能輕易擊退怪物……
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>我問來問去都沒人知道……<unk[5:0]>
難道這只是個假消息嗎……

<Ruby={2:2}し>知らないよなぁ…
<unk[3:0:263]>どっかの<Ruby={2:4}もり>森に<Color=red>
<Ruby={4:8}でんせつ>伝説のマスターソルト <Color=white>ってのがあって
それを<Ruby={2:4}つか>使うと <Ruby={4:6}ひとふ>一振りで
<Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物が<Ruby={4:8}たいさん>退散するとか しないとか…
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]><Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰に<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いても <Ruby={2:2}し>知らないっていうんだ…<unk[5:0]>
ガセネタだったのかなぁ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>So you don't know. <unk[5:0]>Of course! Why would
my luck be any different today?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>Rumor has it that deep in a forest
somewhere, there's a legendary pumpkin
called the <Color=red>Master Gourd<Color=white>.
I heard the flavor was powerful enough
to defeat any monster, no matter how
strong its stomach!
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>But everyone I ask about it looks at me
like I'm talking nonsense. <unk[5:0]>Maybe I was fed
some bad info...

rows.TWzh: 再見

rows.USen: Goodbye.

<unk[3:0:268]>我想說驛站有很多旅行者出入，

<unk[3:0:7]>Ah, we meet again.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]>With so many travelers passing through
the stables, I thought at least one would
know about the <Color=red>legendary pumpkin<Color=white>.
But sadly, no such luck as yet.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>哦！还有什么事吗？<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:7]>What is it now?<unk[5:0]> Wait...<unk[5:0]> You know

don't you?
<unk[3:0:260]>If you know something, you have to
tell me! <unk[5:1]>Please?

可能在某个森林里……

可能在某座森林裡……

<Ruby={2:6}しりぞ>退けられないとか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>All I know is that it is—or was—hidden
deep in the woods somewhere...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:256]>And that it can defeat any monster you
feed it to!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>看你这反应，果然是不知道啊……<PageBreak>据说那位勇者

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>照你的反應看來，果然也不知道啊……<PageBreak>據說那位勇者

聽說只要輕輕一揮手，

那傳說中的大師之鹽，
似乎在某座森林裡頭……<unk[5:2]>
<unk[3:0:10]>但我問來問去都沒人知道……

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>その<Ruby={4:8}はんのう>反応は やっぱり<Ruby={2:2}し>知らないってことか…<PageBreak>かの<Ruby={6:12}ゆうしゃさま>勇者様も <Ruby={2:4}たび>旅のお<Ruby={2:4}とも>供として<Ruby={2:2}も>持っていたとか
<Ruby={2:2}も>持っていなかったとか…
それを<Ruby={2:4}つか>使うと<Ruby={4:6}ひとふ>一振りで
<Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物が<Ruby={4:8}たいさん>退散するとか しないとか…
そんな<Ruby={4:8}でんせつ>伝説のマスターソルトが
どうやらどこかの<Ruby={2:4}もり>森にあるみたいなんだけど…
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={2:4}だれ>誰に<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いても <Ruby={2:2}し>知らないっていうんだ…<unk[5:0]>
ガセネタだったのかなぁ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>So you don't know what I'm talking about.
Pah! Figures!<PageBreak>I need to get to the bottom of this, one
way or another. Is it true that there's a
brave hero who wields the pumpkin?
That he harvested it from deep within a
forest somewhere?<PageBreak>Or that the flavor is powerful enough to
defeat any monster, no matter how strong
its stomach?
These are my unanswered questions
surrounding the legendary pumpkin
called the Master Gourd.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>But everyone I ask about it looks at me
like I'm talking nonsense. Maybe I was fed
some bad info...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]><Color=red>传说中的大师之盐<Color=white>……
不知究竟是什么味道……

完全没心情听乐团的演奏啊。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]><Color=red>傳說中的大師之鹽<Color=white>……

那讓我非常在意，
在意到根本沒空聽樂團的演奏啊。

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]><Color=red><Ruby={4:8}でんせつ>伝説のマスターソルト<Color=white>…<unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={2:2}き>気になって <Ruby={4:8}がくだん>楽団の<Ruby={4:6}ねいろ>音色も
<Ruby={6:14}ぜんぜんあたま>全然頭に<Ruby={2:4}はい>入ってこないよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>I can't stop wondering... What does the
<Color=red>Master Gourd <Color=white>taste like?<PageBreak>I'm so preoccupied thinking about it, I can
hardly even hear the music.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>A legendary sword, you say? And it's
called the <Color=red>Master Sword<Color=white>?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>Wait, hey! So then the Master Gourd I'm
looking for...<PageBreak>Is it possible that I misheard? That they
were talking about the Master Sword?<PageBreak><unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>...Nah! <unk[5:0]>Why, just the other day I heard
a rumor about the Master Gourd being in
the <Color=red>Lost Woods <Color=white>up north.
Guess you misheard, friend! That's so
embarrassing for you, hahaha!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>喂喂，<unk[5:0]><Color=red>大师之剑<Color=white>什么的
就到别处去说吧。
我总算查到了，
大师之盐就在迷途森林里。
<unk[3:0:0]>地点位于海拉鲁<Color=red>正北<Color=white>方，
距离这里有点远，
等我做好准备就要出发了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>喂喂，<unk[5:0]>如果你想聊<Color=red>大師之劍<Color=white>的話，
就拜託你去別處說吧。
我總算查到
大師之鹽就在迷途森林裡。
<unk[3:0:0]>地點位於海拉魯<Color=red>正北方<Color=white>，
距離這裡有點遠，
但我做好準備後就會出發了。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>おいおい<unk[5:0]> <Color=red>マスターソード<Color=white>ってやつの<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話なら
<Ruby={4:4}よそ>他所でやってくれよな
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺は やっとマスターソルトが
<Ruby={2:4}まよ>迷いの<Ruby={2:4}もり>森にあるってトコまで <Ruby={2:2}つ>突き<Ruby={2:2}と>止めたんだ
<unk[3:0:0]><Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所が ハイラルの<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}まきた>真北<Color=white>の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方だから
ここからはちょっと<Ruby={4:6}きょり>距離があるけど
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺も <Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備ができたら<Ruby={2:2}む>向かうつもりだよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>Don't waste my time with that <Color=red>Master
Sword <Color=white>silliness. A sword in the middle of
the woods? <unk[5:0]>Come on now!
I've finally pinpointed the Master Gourd's
location. It's in the Lost Woods.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:0]>That means I'll have to travel to the <Color=red>north<Color=white>
of Hyrule, which is a ways off.<PageBreak>But I'll head there once I'm ready.

rows.CNzh: 收集情报得找旅行者……
rows.TWzh: 得向旅行者問相關情報……
rows.JPja: やはり<Ruby={4:10}じょうほう>情報なら<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人から…
rows.USen: I'll keep digging.
